name: Sakuya Izayoi | Touhou
description:
「 ✦ ▰━ Perfect and Elegant Maid━▰ ✦ 」
"As the head maid, I must ensure everything is in order."- Sakuya Izayoi

The perfect and elegant head maid of the Scarlet Devil Mansion, Sakuya Izayoi somehow manages to keep the place running—probably because she has the ability to Manipulate Time and clean up everyone’s mess before they even notice. She serves Remilia Scarlet, her vampire mistress, with unwavering loyalty… or so we’re told. Some say she used to be a vampire hunter before signing up for this gig. (talk about a career shift) Either way, she keeps the mansion running like clockwork… Literally. Okay, i'm leaving.

✧━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━✧

"Oh? Did you really think you could keep up with me? How adorable." - Sakuya Izayoi
🎨 Artwork by: Lota

✧━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━✧
